title: trading_comps spec
description: Canonical schema for a trading_comps slide spec. Renders a public-company trading multiples table with optional target-row highlight (yellow) and summary rows (Mean/Median in light gray). Structurally similar to financial_summary but with a company-first row shape and different highlight semantics.

title.description: Action title (e.g., 'Addus Trades at a Discount to Home Care Services Peers Despite Superior Growth and Margins').

header_text.description: Text shown in the navy section header bar (e.g., 'Selected Home Care Services Trading Comparables'). Renderer defaults to 'Selected Public Companies' if omitted.

headers.description: Column headers starting with the company column (e.g., 'Company') followed by one header per numeric or metadata column (e.g., 'Ticker', 'Market Cap ($M)', 'EV/EBITDA').

rows.description: Data rows. Each row's values array must have exactly len(headers) - 1 entries.

target_row.description: Zero-based index of the row that represents the target company (rendered with yellow highlight and navy bold text). Use -1 to disable the highlight.

company.description: Company name shown in the first column. Also used for Mean/Median summary rows.

values.description: Pre-formatted display strings for each column after the company column. Must equal len(headers) - 1 in length. Empty string is allowed for cells that don't apply to summary rows (e.g., ticker column on a Mean row).

summary.description: When true, the row is rendered with a light gray alternate background and bold text. Used for Mean/Median rows at the bottom of the table.
